mapper.sql: select contract_id, company_id, company_name, project_name, contract_name, contract_no, contract_amount, start_date, end_date, entry_unit, attachment_name, attachment_path, terminate_flag, terminate_time, renewed_from_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, case when terminate_flag = '1' then 'inactive' when end_date < curdate() then 'expired' when end_date >= curdate() and datediff(end_date, curdate()) <= 60 then 'expiring' else 'valid' end as contract_status, case when terminate_flag = '1' then '3' when end_date < curdate() then '2' when end_date >= curdate() and datediff(end_date, curdate()) <= 60 then '1' else '0' end as pool_type from fire_contract
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
and (company_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or contract_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or contract_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and company_name like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%')
and company_id = #{companyId}
and terminate_flag = '0' and end_date >= curdate() and datediff(end_date, curdate()) > 60
and terminate_flag = '0' and end_date >= curdate() and datediff(end_date, curdate()) <= 60
and terminate_flag = '0' and end_date < curdate()
and terminate_flag = '1'
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into fire_contract
company_id, company_name, project_name, contract_name, contract_no, contract_amount, start_date, end_date, entry_unit, attachment_name, attachment_path, terminate_flag, terminate_time, renewed_from_id, remark, create_by, create_time
#{companyId}, #{companyName}, #{projectName}, #{contractName}, #{contractNo}, #{contractAmount}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{entryUnit}, #{attachmentName}, #{attachmentPath}, #{terminateFlag}, #{terminateTime}, #{renewedFromId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate()
mapper.update:
update fire_contract
company_id = #{companyId}, company_name = #{companyName}, project_name = #{projectName}, contract_name = #{contractName}, contract_no = #{contractNo}, contract_amount = #{contractAmount}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, entry_unit = #{entryUnit}, attachment_name = #{attachmentName}, attachment_path = #{attachmentPath},
terminate_flag = #{terminateFlag}, terminate_time = case when #{terminateFlag} = '1' then sysdate() else null end,
renewed_from_id = #{renewedFromId}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where contract_id = #{contractId}

update fire_contract set del_flag = '2' where contract_id in
#{contractId}
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(case when del_flag = '0' and terminate_flag = '0' and end_date >= curdate() and datediff(end_date, curdate()) > 60 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as validCount, ifnull(sum(case when del_flag = '0' and terminate_flag = '0' and end_date >= curdate() and datediff(end_date, curdate()) <= 60 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiringCount, ifnull(sum(case when del_flag = '0' and terminate_flag = '0' and end_date < curdate() then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiredCount, ifnull(sum(case when del_flag = '0' and terminate_flag = '1' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as inactiveCount from fire_contract
